pure-black.$description: Pure Black — Page canvas, section backgrounds, project card fills — the void everything else floats on

soft-black.$description: Soft Black — Subtle surface elevation over the pure black canvas, card backgrounds in tight stacks

bone-white.$description: Bone White — Primary text, headings, hairline borders, nav text — the only light in the room

fog-gray.$description: Fog Gray — Secondary text, metadata, captions, image borders, inactive labels

graphite.$description: Graphite — Footer borders, section dividers, rare structural lines that recede into the dark

scarlet-signal.$description: Scarlet Signal — Supporting palette color for small decorative accents when the core palette needs contrast.

rose-brand-spectrum.$description: Rose Brand Spectrum — Brand color exploration panel — a pink-to-black swatch that walks from #f5a5a5 → #e85a5a → #d42020 → #7a0a0a → #2a0606 → #000000 as a literal brand-color system reveal

nextbook.$description: The studio's own custom display and text face. Weight 300 whispers in section headings and 80px display; weight 400 carries body, labels, and nav. Used across every context — hero, body, heading, link, list, icon, footer.

circular-std.$description: Referenced inside project case studies (the 'AaBbCc 1234' specimen tile) as a client font example — not part of Studio Oker's own UI system

canvas-black.$description: Surface level 0: Full-bleed page background across all sections

soft-black.$description: Surface level 1: Rare slightly-elevated card or panel that breaks the void by 1-2% lightness

graphite-line.$description: Surface level 2: Hairline divider between footer blocks and major section breaks
